faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you wanted to know about development but were embarrassed to ask.
faq.a1: We launch the basic version (MVP) in 14 days. This allows you to immediately start working and receiving data. Complete setup of a complex turnkey ERP system usually takes from 1 to 2 months depending on number of modules.
faq.q2: Do I need to pay monthly?
faq.a2: We are flexible. We can build a system you fully own (one-time payment) and you only pay for hosting (~$10–20/mo). Or we can work on a subscription model with our technical support.
faq.q3: Can you integrate with my bank / 1C?
faq.a3: Yes, our architecture allows you to connect to any external services via API. We integrate payment systems (Payme, Click), telephony, 1C, MoySklad and other tools.
faq.q4: Will I be able to change the settings myself?
faq.a4: Certainly. We create a convenient admin panel where you can manage employees, access rights, directories and content without knowledge of code.
faq.a5: After the project is completed, we provide 1 month of free warranty support. Next, you can enter into a technical support agreement (SLA) so that we monitor the servers and update the system.
